synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0439 Oracle Linux 10 openssl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0439
description:
[3.5.1-5.0.1]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug: 34340177]
- Update FIPS provider name [Orabug: 35824276]

[1:3.5.1-5]
- Do not make key share choice in tls1_set_groups()
  Resolves: RHEL-130992
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0439

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0439.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
openssl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
openssl-devel-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
openssl-libs-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
openssl-perl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
openssl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
openssl-devel-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
openssl-libs-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
openssl-perl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/openssl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[3.5.1-5.0.1]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug: 34340177]
- Update FIPS provider name [Orabug: 35824276]

[1:3.5.1-5]
- Do not make key share choice in tls1_set_groups()
  Resolves: RHEL-130992
